settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: We ship across India within 5–7 business days and internationally within 10–15 business days, depending on destination customs processing.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes — we currently ship to 6 countries including the US, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore, and the UAE. Shipping is free on orders over ₹999 (or the equivalent in your local currency).

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link by email. You can also check status anytime on our Track Order page using your order ID.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for unused, unopened items in original packaging. See our full Returns & Refunds policy for details.

settings.question: How do I request a refund?
settings.answer: Contact us with your order number and reason for return. Once we receive and inspect the item, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method.

settings.question: Are sacred/pooja items returnable?
settings.answer: For hygiene and ritual-use reasons, opened consumables, idols that have been consecrated, and personal-use Ayurvedic items are not eligible for return unless defective.

settings.question: Are your products genuinely handcrafted?
settings.answer: Yes. Every item is sourced directly from verified traditional artisans across Tamil Nadu and India, personally vetted by our founder Mrs Anitha Kuppusamy.

settings.question: Are your Ayurvedic products certified?
settings.answer: Our Ayurvedic and herbal products use pure, traditionally-sourced ingredients. Certification details are listed on individual product pages where applicable.

settings.question: Can I get help choosing the right product?
settings.answer: Absolutely — reach out via WhatsApp or our Contact page and our team will help you choose based on your ritual, gifting, or wellness needs.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtext: Answers to common questions about orders, shipping, returns, and our products. Can't find what you're looking for?
